feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP FICO Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am preparing for FICO certification doing practice and i need guidance how to apply for exam and any book suggestion for SAP FICO.

also kindly suggest how to move to SAP FICO Team am part of financial team for 12 years

 

Regards,

Sairam.N

entry.title: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am currently leading the end-to-end implementation of the embedded EWM module. As we approach the cutover phase in the client’s production environment, I have requested broad access permissions to perform certain client-specific technical activities. These activities often involve complex object configurations that do not follow the typical transport order process. Given these requirements, I believe it is necessary to have a temporary, consultant-level user role with SAP_ALL access. However, the client has raised concerns about audit compliance and is hesitant to grant this access.

Is there any official documentation or best practice guideline available that supports the need for extended permissions during critical implementation phases? This would help the client understand the necessity of SAP_ALL for certain technical tasks during cutover and allow us to proceed effectively

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP AATP
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am working on aATP SUP ( Supply protection)  in my current project and I need some examples of AATP SUP over protection drawback and other limitation if it has.

Similarly, please suggest which SUP is better to use in retail industry - Vertical protection or horizontal protection??

Thanks in Advance

Regards

Rinku

entry.title: I need to add a field in FCC in receiver channel for csv along with the incoming array from Source
entry.content:
The problem is data from source has field and an array .SO when mapping to FCC in receiver channel for creating CSV,the one field mapped is coming only once but the array lines are coming multiple times

 

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
0390657434
|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

I need below.0390657434 is not coming in array but outside array

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
|0390657434|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|3||BNTFR100-81|820|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

entry.title: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", "discussion", "blog article"
entry.content:
I see in my Notification feed questions, discussions and blog posts which are all tagged "posted a new topic" or "replied to topic", and I need to look at the picture to know if it's a question, a blog post or even a discussion. It has taken me months to change my habit from going from the text to the picture, in fact I have to look at both parts, the kind of topic, and the topic title. Why not having the whole information in the text? Proposing to replace "topic" with either "question", "discussion" or "blog article".

Here, it's a question:

It's a blog post:

It's a discussion:

Surprisingly, "topic" is not used in "commented on blog article":

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: SAP Community issues when posting new blogs
entry.content:
Dear Community colleagues,

I encountered the following issues when posting blogs in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/bg-p/erp-blog-sap

  • SAP Managed Tags can't be saved and need enter again in case you need to re-edit a blog;
  • Loading performance is too bad when create or re-edit a blog which is not user-friendly for blogger;
  • Part of blog content can't be saved , example: if hyperlink is the start of the line of a blog, it will remove it and not to be saved which could be a bug;

Can anyone double check these issues?

Thanks in advance!

Br Bob

entry.title: How does your personality influence the way you approach problem-solving in SAP projects?
entry.content:
Do you think your personality plays a role in how you approach problem-solving in SAP projects? For instance, analytical individuals might rely heavily on data and logic to troubleshoot, while creative thinkers might look for out-of-the-box solutions. Collaborative personalities may focus on teamwork to resolve issues, whereas independent personalities might dive deep into self-research.

In your experience with SAP, have you noticed how your unique traits influence your workflow, learning style, or the way you tackle challenges? I'd love to hear how personality impacts the way you use SAP tools and collaborate within teams!

entry.title: SAP business one - HANA error: Getting error while launching SAP HANA Client
entry.content:
method GET uri /sap/sbo/cockpit/ Problem while connecting to server: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out

Getting this error when opening SAP Hana.  

 

SAP BusinessObjects Dashboards

entry.title: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API with ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hello All,

Are there any API related between SAP For Me OSS Cases and ServiceNow. We want to automate the creation of incident ticket once an OSS case is created. Automation involves when the OSS case was updated, the SNOW ticket will also be updated in the worknotes. Also, is there a dashboard where we can utilize in SAP For Me to see the report overview of all the OSS case status besides the SAP For Me > Services & Support > Cases.

Thank you!

entry.title: Archiving DBTABLOG, lot of POWL_SELCRIT records
entry.content:
We are in process of doing Archiving of DBTABLOG, and I can see that the majority of records are related to POWL_SELCRIT.

Is there any reason to keep those archives, or can we just delete the archive related to POWL_SELCRIT table in DBTABLOG.

Should we just turn off logging for POWL_SELCRIT?

entry.title: SO - Billing document - statistical internal order
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The transfer of a billing document into Financial Accounting is rejected with error message KI 235: "Account <(>&<)> requires an assignment to a CO object".The system expects an account assignment to a cost center.

In the line item of billing document, is it possible to use a statistical internal order as an account assignment object, with a cost center specified within it for actual postings, and the account being a cost element of type 1?

Thanks!

entry.title: B1DI Connection issue error connection refuse
entry.content:
Dear Team,
we are configure a B1i integration component after SAP HANA
when test B1DI connection that time given connection refuse issue . Please suggest on that 

Error : XCE001 Nested exception:
java.rmi.RemoteException: Error on completion of HTTPS-roundtrip: java.net.ConnectException: Connection refused: connect: /192.168.0.229:2099; nested exception is:
java.net.ConnectException: Connection refused: connect: /192.168.0.229:2099

entry.title: Please can someone explain how to unflag for deletion a reference operation set. (cp 431)
How to activate Add, Edit button in app "Manage Commodity Codes"?
entry.content: I have an issue that I cannot edit or add commodity codes in app "Manage Commodity Codes". The buttons are invisible. How can I enable them?

entry.title: Error when trying to create the export declaration
entry.content:
Hello community

We are having an issue trying to create the export declaration in TM. 

The configuration was performed as indicated in the implementation guide called “Integration of SAP TM with SAP Global Trade Services”, however when trying to create the export declaration the following errors appear:

We cannot find where the system is searching and verifying this data

Can you help us?

Thank you in advance

Augusto.

entry.title: Any chances to change Based unit of Measure of Materials?
Deleting Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello,

how can I delete an already published blog post?

thanks.

br Conny

entry.title: SAP HANA : Performance assessment over monitor view M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_
entry.content:
Dear all

Today we have a performance problem in our production system. The monitor view M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_ is taking around 20 sec to be consulted. Whereas in acceptance it takes around 3 seconds for the same ammount of rows (prod = 240 rows , acc = 236 rows)

select count(1) FROM SYS.M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_

PRODUCTION (20 sec)

ACCEPTANCE (3 sec)

The question I have is , how can I analyse where the statement is spending most of the time. This will definitely lead us to the root cause of the performance.

Thank you in advance for all your support.

entry.title: Need some clarification or suggestions regarding T-Code MD07 output
entry.content:
Hi folks,

i need some clarification/suggestions from you regarding T-Code MD07 output.

While checking Output of the MD07 T-code by MRP Controller wise it gives the outputs properly,

but checking with over all plant level without giving any MRP Controller information it shows very limited data.

I need all Material informations of MRP Controllers by giving Plant alone in MD07 tcode. Is it possible to get, kindly give your inputs on this. 

Thanks in advance, 

Regards

Aravind
